session_title: FILL IN — the real session title from the original HoBB program
session_description: FILL IN — one paragraph from the program describing what the session was about. The Speaker ID pass uses this as context, so keep it substantive.
track: FILL IN if there was one, otherwise empty string

roster.name: First Last
roster.title: Role / title from the program
roster.bio: Two to four sentences. Specificity matters — include the concepts and organizations they are associated with, because the Speaker ID pass uses the bio for expertise matching in Pass 3. A vague bio produces vague attributions.
